name: PILD: Physics-Informed Learning via Diffusion

description: arXiv:2601.21284v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful generative tools for modeling complex data distributions, yet their purely data-driven nature limits applicability in engineering and scientific problems where physical laws must be respected. This paper proposes Physics-Informed Learning via Diffusion (PILD), a framework that unifies diffusion m...
author: Tianyi Zeng, Tianyi Wang, Jiaru Zhang, Zimo Zeng, Feiyang Zhang, Yiming Xu, Sikai Chen, Junfeng Jiao, Christian Claudel, Xinbo Chen
